assignments.description: Stamps default Description and AccountSource onto the trigger record so the calling Apex action can verify field write-back.
assignments.name: StampDefaults
assignments.label: Stamp Defaults

Flow.description: Subscriber-namespace test flow used by the flow-as-trigger-action release-testing Phase 5B. Bound to TriggerAction__mdt rows that point at kern__TRG_InvokeFlow. Sets default Description and AccountSource on the trigger Account so the calling Apex can verify cross-namespace flow invocation and field write-back.
Flow.label: TST Subscriber Flow Set Defaults

variables.description: Trigger record passed in by kern.TRG_InvokeFlow. Mutated in place; the calling Apex copies populated fields back onto Trigger.new.
variables.name: record

variables.description: Pre-update record passed in by kern.TRG_InvokeFlow on update events. Read-only; not used by this flow but declared so the trigger framework can supply it without unused-key warnings.
variables.name: recordPrior
